message:
fix(ci): enrich 165 bead close reasons with evidence linkage references

Auto-mapped closed task beads to their corresponding unit tests, e2e
scenarios, invariant suites, and artifact paths. The lint-evidence gate
now passes: 261 beads checked, 0 violations, 86 passed, 175 warnings.

Combined with SandyOwl's EVIDENCE_REQUIRED_TYPES filter fix (cf935dc),
this clears the full evidence linkage gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
